name: Hot Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Set aside 1 cup of each cheese to use for topping.
2. Beat the cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add the other ingredients and mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch glass dish and sprinkle with the reserved cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
6. Serve with tortilla chips.
